44.reason: The function returns 0 for a successfully read word, but the main loop checks for EOF. Since 0 != EOF, the loop will never terminate when the file ends, causing an infinite loop or runtime error.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The function returns 0 for a successfully read word, but the main loop checks for EOF. Since 0 != EOF, the loop will never terminate when the file ends, causing an infinite loop or runtime error.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The function returns 0 on success, but the main loop expects it to return something other than EOF to continue. The reference program returns 1 on success. Returning 0 causes the loop condition (getWord(...) != EOF) to always be true since 0 != EOF, leading to infinite loop or incorrect behavior. Also, after reading the last word, it may not properly signal EOF.]
